pi_items.source: setup_woocommerce.sh line 235: wp wc product create --name="Wireless Bluetooth Headphones" --sku="WBH-001"
task.json description: 'Set the Sale Price to $49.99'. Verifier.py line 58 confirms this expected value.

task.json description: 'Schedule the sale to run from July 1, 2025 (2025-07-01)'. Unix timestamp 2025-07-01 00:00:00 UTC = 1751328000. Verifier accepts range 1751241600-1751414400 (June 29-July 1 UTC).

task.json description: 'Schedule the sale to run from ... to July 7, 2025 (2025-07-07)'. Unix timestamp 2025-07-07 00:00:00 UTC = 1751846400. Verifier accepts range 1751760000-1751932800 (July 5-7 UTC).
setup_woocommerce.sh line 235: --regular_price="79.99". Confirmed by setup_task.sh lines 37-38 which resets regular price to 79.99 for clean state.

privileged_info_summary: The task 'schedule_product_sale' operates on a synthetically generated WooCommerce e-commerce environment. The target product is 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' with SKU WBH-001, created during environment setup with a regular price of $79.99. The agent must set a sale price of $49.99 and schedule the sale from July 1, 2025 (2025-07-01) to July 7, 2025 (2025-07-07) in the WooCommerce admin interface. All metadata claims align with the task description and the database setup scripts that initialize this synthetic test data.
